mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage replaces the I2S-planted color_type byte (0x03) with a <GAP> placeholder; structural recombination never restores the exact byte, so the palette equality gate stays unresolved.
one_line: Grimoire GAP abstraction erases exact color_type byte I2S planted

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage abstracts the concrete 0x09 tab byte into a <GAP> token; structural mutators recombine these generalized fragments, permanently losing the specific literal byte the gate requires, while re-execution overhead adds throughput cost.
one_line: Grimoire GAP token erases exact 0x09 tab byte required by equality gate

mechanism_summary: Grimoire's GeneralizationStage re-runs and structural recombination produce short, fragmented inputs that cannot advance the parser far enough to fill the buffer beyond the threshold; cmplog's I2S+havoc builds coherent long content that satisfies the buffer-ahead condition.
one_line: Grimoire structural fragmentation prevents parser from buffering enough content
